title: avenastrum leve
intro: Avenastrum leve, also known as St. Bernard's Wort, is a perennial plant species in the Saxifragaceae family that is native to Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral agent. The health benefits of Avenastrum leve include its potential to reduce fever, relieve digestive issues, and support the immune system. Avenastrum leve can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in herbal remedies to enhance its medicinal properties.
